response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong technical expertise in developer tools, testing infrastructure, and full-stack development, with relevant experience in build systems, CI/CD, and open-source contributions. While his people-management experience is limited, his technical leadership and cross-functional collaboration align well with the role's focus on engineering productivity.
strengths: Extensive experience with developer tools, CI/CD, and testing infrastructure (e.g., GitLab, Docker, artifactory).
Proven technical leadership in open-source projects (GISCollective) and contributions to AI-agent tooling (MCP code generators).
Strong system design and architecture skills across web, mobile, and embedded systems.
concerns: Only indirect people-management experience (e.g., mentoring, workshops) with no explicit team leadership or performance management roles.
Lacks direct mobile-platform experience, which is a preferred qualification.
No formal education in computer science (ETH Zürich degree is unrelated to CS).
